name: Sicilian Eggplant Appetizer
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube the eggplant without peeling it.
2. Fry the cubes in olive oil in a skillet until golden brown.
3. In another skillet, fry the celery until it begins to brown.
4. Add the fried celery to the skillet with the eggplant.
5. Pour tomato sauce into an empty skillet and mix in vinegar, honey, halved green olives, halved black olives, capers, and pine nuts.
6. Stir until all ingredients are well blended.
7. Pour the mixture over the eggplant, then add salt and pepper.
8. Simmer for 10 minutes, stirring often. If necessary, add water to reach desired consistency.
9. Allow to cool before serving.
